description: Self-contained, portable configuration unit. Defines packages, files, and scripts with cross-platform resolution and dependency management.

children.description: Preferred package managers in order (e.g., [brew, apt, script])
children.name: prefer

children.description: Inline install script or path (used when prefer includes 'script')
children.name: script

children.description: Platform filter: linux, macos, freebsd, ubuntu, arch, x86_64, aarch64
children.name: platforms

children.description: Source path (local relative or git URL with @tag, ?ref=, //subdir)
children.name: source

fields.description: Files to manage (local or git sources)
fields.name: files

fields.description: Environment variables merged with profile env (module wins on conflict by name)
fields.name: env

fields.description: Shell aliases merged with profile aliases (module wins on conflict by name)
fields.name: aliases

children.description: Scripts to run after module is applied
children.name: postApply

name: Module
